rationale: Reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk by switching LLM invocation to file-based payloads and minimizing inline prompt size in a centralized procedural config.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.llm_invocation_policy.v1",
  "use_file_payload": true,
  "inline_prompt_max_chars": 1200,
  "prefer_prompt_file": true,
  "notes": "Constrain inline prompt size to reduce Windows CLI length issues; send full payload via temp file."
}

risks: If consumers do not read this policy file, no behavior change; if they do and require inline prompts, they may truncate overly long prompts.
expected_benefit: Lower likelihood of Windows CLI arg-length failures and more reliable LLM execution with large payloads.
